name: Quick Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Shake the container of cake mix before measuring and spoon the mix lightly into the measuring cup.
3. Mix in the water and vanilla, using an electric mixer or beat by hand with a total of 300 strokes. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
4. Pour batter into two well-greased 9-inch layer pans and bake for 25 to 30 minutes.
